body.title: context-load step 0 — verify REAL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set and != Igor's OR key
body.result: Added env key safety check as Step 0 in context-load SKILL.md — verifies REAL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and warns if OPENROUTER_API_KEY leaks into CC env
body.description:
Verify at session startup that REAL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set and distinct from Igor's OpenRouter key. Add Step 0 to `/context-load`: read $REAL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (must be non-empty, must start with `sk-ant-`), read $OPENROUTER_API_KEY (must be empty or warn loudly), confirm key handoff from `superclaude` was clean. Output one-line 'env: CC key OK, Igor key absent' on success, surface failure to Akien inline. Scope: startup invariant only. Files: context-load/SKILL.md. Risk: none (pure safety check).

test_plan: (1) Run context-load with OPENROUTER_API_KEY set — assert loud warning printed. (2) Run with REAL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset — assert error surface. (3) Normal context-load still completes.
